query:
SELECT 
  'faturamento_tiss' as tabela,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN convenio_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_convenio,
  SUM(CASE WHEN data_referencia IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_data_ref
FROM faturamento_tiss
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'recebimento_tiss' as tabela,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN convenio_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_convenio,
  SUM(CASE WHEN data_referencia IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_data_ref
FROM recebimento_tiss
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'recebimentos_excel' as tabela,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN convenio_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_convenio,
  SUM(CASE WHEN data_referencia IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_data_ref
FROM recebimentos_excel;
